title: class
description: Class instance with string, number, and Date data fields plus a getFullName() method. Serializes its data fields only and decodes to a plain object — the method is dropped and the prototype is lost.
notes: Class instance decodes to a plain object (asymmetric deserializedValues): the getFullName method is non-serializable and dropped, the instance prototype is not restored.
The startDate Date field round-trips via ISO string.
generated: function NzL_kCQwWAs(v){const cs_MySerializableClass = utl.getClassSerializer('MySerializableClass');if (cs_MySerializableClass) return cs_MySerializableClass.serialize(v); return {name:v.name,surname:v.surname,id:v.id,startDate:v.startDate.toISOString()}}
